items.title: Solana flips Ethereum in RWA lending as institutional flows rise in Q1
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's rise in real-world asset lending indicates growing institutional interest, potentially enhancing SOL's liquidity and positioning in the DeFi landscape.

items.title: Fake Ledger app on Apple App Store linked to $9.5M crypto theft across Bitcoin, Tron, Solana: ZachXBT
items.whyYouShouldCare: The emergence of a fake Ledger app highlights security vulnerabilities, which could impact user trust and adoption of Solana-based applications.

items.title: X product chief Nikita Bier teases a crypto ‘fix’ amid market slump
items.whyYouShouldCare: The potential introduction of a crypto solution by X's product chief could influence market dynamics and user engagement within the Solana ecosystem.
